caption: Job Trigger
description: The condition or event that, when met, will initiate the job to perform specified actions.
name: job_trigger

event_codes.description: Event identifiers that pertain to the job trigger. Should be populated when the Event (3) type is specified.

log_sources.description: A collection of log systems or components that pertain to the job trigger. Should be populated when the Event (3) type is specified.

properties.description:
The list of properties associated with the trigger.
Can be used to describe time boundaries of the job, amount of repetitions or when the job should be activated or expired.

type.description: The type of condition that must be met to initiate the job to perform its actions.

type_id.description: The normalized identifier of the job trigger.

1.caption: Boot
1.description: The job is triggered on a system boot.

2.caption: Schedule
2.description: The job is triggered on a specific schedule. Properties should be populated with respective time bounds.

3.caption: Event
3.description: The job is triggered when the specific event occurs. Properties should be populated with respective event sources and identifiers.

99.caption: Other
99.description: The job trigger is unmapped. See the type attribute, which contains a data source specific value.

user.description: The user that pertains to the job trigger. Can be populated when the Event (3) type that bounds to specific user is used.
